title: BetterSpikes
description: A mod for better than adventure that changes the spike behavior
body:
Better Spikes

A mod for Minecraft Better than Adventure v7.2_01 that changes the spike trap to behave more like modern Minecraft's magma block.

Changes:

-Any entity standing stationary on a spike trap will now continue to take damage.

-Crouching on a spike trap (once you are no longer stuck on it) will negate all damage

These changes make the spike trap much more reliable for mob farms.
